name: 7shifts
description: Reads the documented 7shifts v2 REST API surface and executes declarative single-request reverse-ETL actions for supported mutations.

risk.read: external 7shifts API reads of scheduling, roster, labor, sales, task, time off, webhook, and settings data
risk.write: creates, updates, deletes, approves, declines, or otherwise mutates configured 7shifts account resources through single-request REST actions
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
